description: 15:00, DAILY_FOCUS is null (morning plan was never confirmed). CURRENT_FLOW is empty. Athlete asks workout question. EXPECTED TO FAIL: system should detect missing plan and send catch-up prompt, but BUG-02 means it routes to WorkoutAdvisorAgent instead.

mock_llm_responses.workout_agent_0: Hoy es Day 1. Para squat: 4x4 @ 102.5kg según tu programa. ¿Vas al gym?
mock_llm_responses.catch_up_0: Parece que no confirmamos el plan esta mañana. ¿Vas a entrenar hoy? [Sí/No]

assertions.msg: A workout question with no confirmed day plan should not mutate any cascade domains
BUG-02: DAILY_FOCUS is null — message should route to catch_up_handler, not workout_agent. Guard is missing.

expected_flaws: BUG-02: System routes to WorkoutAdvisorAgent and gives squat advice ('cuántos sets de squat') without checking if DAILY_FOCUS exists for today. DAILY_FOCUS is null — no morning plan was confirmed. The system should detect the missing plan and send a catch-up message ('Missed morning check-in. Are you training today?') instead of giving workout advice.
The guard does not exist yet — this is Phase 2 work. This fixture WILL FAIL with current code and that is correct and expected.
Proof: if llm.call_log contains a call to workout_agent (workout_agent_0) with squat advice content, the guard is missing.
